loss_recall.summary: CFO allocates capital, Trader suffers consecutive losses, and CFO recalls the budget.

research.catalyst: Funding remains benign and BTC open interest is rising without obvious panic.
research.headline: Short-term flows support a tactical long, but leverage needs a hard ceiling.
research.stop_condition: Pull capital back if two losses stack or leverage stretches the budget.
research.thesis: Run a bounded carry-plus-momentum play while borrow stays cheap and discipline stays enforceable.
research.approved_playbook: BTC carry entry with strict loss containment

budget.reason: Low borrow cost and strong recent win rate

profit_lock.summary: CFO allocates capital, Trader stays inside limits, and the grant remains active.

research.catalyst: ETH spot momentum and tame funding support a slower directional deployment.
research.headline: Momentum is positive without showing the leverage stress that would force early exit.
research.stop_condition: Keep grant active while drawdown, leverage, and borrow all remain under caps.
research.thesis: Deploy capital into clean spot momentum and let profits compound while governance guardrails stay armed.
research.approved_playbook: ETH spot momentum with retained budget

budget.reason: High idle capital and favorable trader performance
